seoDescription: Michelle Martinez provides world-class massage therapy in Santa Rosa CA. Call and start improving your health today: (707) 582-5825
aboutBody: Welcome to my Oasis! If you’re looking for a professional massage therapist, you’ve come to the right place!
If you would like to know a few things about your future massage therapist, click on the "About Me" tab and click the "Massage Services" tab to check out the various techniques I am trained in!
"My mission is to promote relaxation, stress relief, and pain free lifestyle through therapeutic massage and bodywork"
